summary: Iteration 66 - Film Shooting System Testing Complete. Backend: ALL 10 TESTS PASSED. Frontend: All shooting features verified working correctly including release popup with shooting option, shooting days slider, bonus/cost preview, direct release warning, and film pronto message.

issues: Donation popup appears on page load with high z-index (z-[100]) intercepting clicks. Must dismiss with Escape key before interacting with UI.

backend.GET /api/films/shooting/config: PASS - Returns bonus_curve (1-10 days), cost_multiplier (0.15), events list (7 events), early_end_cinepass_per_day (2)
backend.POST /api/films/{id}/start-shooting vali: PASS - Rejects invalid shooting_days (0, 11), rejects non-pending_release films
backend.GET /api/films/shooting: PASS - Returns films in shooting phase with progress, events, early_end_cinepass_cost
backend.GET /api/films/pending: PASS - Returns both pending_release AND ready_to_release films
backend.POST /api/films/{id}/release: PASS - Works for pending_release (direct release, -30% cost, quality capped 5.8) and ready_to_release (full quality)

frontend.Dashboard 'Ciak!' button: PASS - Red button in action grid with badge for shooting count (data-testid='shooting-shortcut')
frontend.Pending films section: PASS - Shows pending_release + ready_to_release films with release buttons (data-testid='pending-films-section')
frontend.Release popup for pending_release (Il Ri: PASS - Shows distribution zones, 'Rilascio diretto' warning (capped quality), 'Inizia le Riprese' option with slider
frontend.Shooting option in release popup: PASS - Shows days slider (1-10), bonus preview (+25% for 5 days), cost preview ($375,000), 'Inizia le Riprese (5 giorni)' button
frontend.Release popup for ready_to_release (Test: PASS - Shows 'Film pronto dopo le riprese! Bonus qualità applicato: +0%' message, NO shooting option (correct)
frontend.Studio button: PASS - 'Porta in Studio di Produzione' button visible for pending_release films when user has studio

critical_code_review_comments: Shooting system correctly implements the phase flow: pending_release → shooting → ready_to_release → in_theaters
Direct release option correctly applies 30% cost reduction but caps quality to 58 (5.8 IMDb) and reduces revenue by 40%
Shooting bonus curve correctly configured: 1 day = 10%, 5 days = 25%, 10 days = 40%
Frontend correctly shows/hides shooting option based on film status (pending_release vs ready_to_release)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user account with existing films
context_for_next_testing_agent: Film Shooting System fully implemented and working. Two pending films available for testing: 'Test Film' (ready_to_release - already went through shooting with 0% bonus) and 'Il Ritorno del Gladiatore' (pending_release - can start shooting or direct release). Donation popup frequently blocks UI - dismiss with Escape key. Scheduler processes shooting progress every hour (simulates 1 day per hour).

verified_features.GET /api/films/shooting/config: Returns bonus curve, cost multiplier 0.15, events list
verified_features.POST /api/films/{id}/start-shooting: Validates days (1-10), film status (pending_release only), deducts funds (budget*0.15*days)
verified_features.GET /api/films/shooting: Returns films in shooting with progress, events, early_end_cinepass_cost
verified_features.POST /api/films/{id}/end-shooting-early: Pays CinePass (remaining_days*2), applies bonus, moves to ready_to_release
verified_features.POST /api/films/{id}/release: Works for both film statuses with correct cost/quality calculations
verified_features.Frontend release popup shooting option: Shows for pending_release films with slider, bonus preview, cost preview
verified_features.Frontend release popup for ready_to_rele: Shows 'Film pronto' message with applied bonus, NO shooting option
verified_features.Frontend Ciak button: Shows in action grid with red badge for shooting count
